description: Style Note remanika combines edgy style with flattering fits in all their creations, including this bright, trendy top. Pair it with a pair of well worn and well fitted jeans and flip flops for a disarmingly casual look. Product Details Dark maroon top, has a square neckline with a curved centre, external cowl detail at the bust, a rosette detail on the left shoulder, short sleeves with gathers and reverse pleats below the bust in the front and back Material and Care Viscose Gentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
